The '''Ninth Fleet''' was one of the nine main battlegroups of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]], serving the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Alliance]] government during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].<ref name="Tempest 1">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>

During the crisis, the Ninth Fleet was based at [[General Crix Madine Military Reserve|Crix Base]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]], but it was still enigmatic to high-ranking Alliance figures like [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] of the [[New Jedi Order]].<ref name="Tempest 1" /> In fact, it was the sole GA fleet under [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] command.<ref name="TEA" />

Elements of the Ninth Fleet took part in the [[Battle of Gilatter VIII]].<ref name="Exile 1" />
